name: My Humble House Hospitality Management Consulting Co., Ltd.
summary: My Humble House Hospitality Management Consulting Co., Ltd. operates tourism hotels in Taiwan and internationally. The company also provides hospitality consulting services. Its property portfolio includes the Sheraton Grand Taipei Hotel, Le Meridien Taipei, and Mu Jiao Xi Hotel, as well as My Humble House Art Gallery that presents contemporary works of art. My Humble House Hospitality Management Consulting Co., Ltd. was founded in 2000 and is based in Taipei City, Taiwan.
